app.name: Calqo
app.tagline: A simple, glass-native social visual maker

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Major workspace controls available outside direct canvas dragging.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: General app preferences

data.title: Backup
data.hint: Save a single file with every project and your app preferences — keep it safe or move it to another machine. Restoring adds the file's projects to your library; nothing is overwritten.
data.restoreConfirm: Add {{count}} project(s) from this backup and apply its settings? The app will reload.
data.secretsNote: API keys are not included in backups — you'll re-enter them after restoring.
data.failed: Something went wrong with the backup file.

settings.autoLanguageHint: Uses your browser language when supported.

assetHealth.title: Asset health limits
assetHealth.hint: Soft warning limits only. Imports and exports are never blocked.

ai.title: AI provider
ai.offHint: AI is turned off. Prompt-a-template, translation, and AI graphics are disabled — pick a provider above to enable them.
ai.mockHint: Works offline with deterministic output — no setup required.
ai.officialHint: Official provider adapter with structured-output requests where supported.
ai.compatibleHint: OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Availability of JSON mode and retries depends on that provider.
ai.storeKey: Remember API key in this browser
ai.keyWarning: The browser is not a secure keychain. If remembered, keys are stored in IndexedDB for this site and may be readable by scripts running here. Leave this off unless you accept that tradeoff.
ai.desktopKeyWarning: Desktop remembers API keys with app settings so provider setup survives restart. This is reliable, but not an OS keychain.
ai.keySavedNote: API key saved on this device. It will be remembered after restart.
ai.agentSkillHint: Download a SKILL.md guide for coding agents that generate editable .calqo files from prompts.

agentDrawing.title: Agent drawing
agentDrawing.browserOnly: Live agent drawing runs in the Calqo desktop app: it hosts a local MCP server that coding agents connect to. In the browser, download the agent skill below instead — agents can generate .calqo files you import.
agentDrawing.enableHint: Runs a local MCP server (loopback only) so coding agents like Claude Code can draw editable layers in Calqo. Starts with the app while enabled.
agentDrawing.setupHint: Choose the agent you already use. Calqo prepares the complete connection setup for you.
agentDrawing.setupStepCopy: Choose your agent and click Set up automatically.
agentDrawing.setupStepAdd: If automatic setup cannot find it, use Copy connection setup as the fallback.
agentDrawing.setupStepRestart: Restart the agent or open a new session, then paste the starter request.
agentDrawing.autoSetupSuccess: Calqo was added. Restart the agent or open a new session, then use the starter request.
agentDrawing.autoSetupError: Automatic setup did not finish: {{error}} Use Copy connection setup instead.
agentDrawing.starterPrompt: Use Calqo to create or improve this design. Work in editable layers, use calqo_apply_and_preview for each iteration, inspect the preview, and refine it until it looks polished. Ask me for the subject, format, and copy if I have not provided them.
agentDrawing.tokenHint: The token pairs agents with this Calqo install. Regenerating it disconnects previously configured agents until they update their setup.
agentDrawing.restartHint: Already had the agent open? Start a new session after adding Calqo so its drawing tools appear.
agentDrawing.permissions: When an agent wants to draw
agentDrawing.modeSessionHint: The first change asks for your approval; after that the agent can draw until you revoke or quit Calqo.
agentDrawing.modeAskHint: Every batch of changes asks for your approval.
agentDrawing.modeReadHint: Agents can look at your projects but never change them.
agentDrawing.activityEmpty: No agent activity yet this session.
agentDrawing.approveMessage: {{client}} wants to draw in Calqo. Every change stays editable and undoable. Allow it for this session?

brand.title: Brand
brand.deleteMessage: Delete the brand profile “{{name}}”? This cannot be undone.
brand.emptyHint: Create a brand profile to reuse your palette, fonts, logo, and do-not-translate terms in every new project and prompt.
brand.name: Name
brand.logoInserted: Logo inserted into the open project.
brand.glossaryHint: Terms merged into every project this profile is applied to (brand names to keep untranslated, preferred renderings).

install.title: Install Calqo
install.body: Add Calqo to your Home Screen for a faster, full-screen experience.
